name: acoder
description: ACoder — a Claude-Code-style CLI Coding Agent with tools, skills, ReAct/Plan modes and sub-agent orchestration.

scripts.test: tsx src/test/compression.test.ts && tsx src/test/skills.test.ts && tsx src/test/memory-context.test.ts && tsx src/test/file-tools.test.ts && tsx src/test/analyze-code.test.ts
scripts.demo:react: WORKDIR=demo-workspace tsx src/cli.ts --once "读取 README.md 并总结其要点"
scripts.demo:plan: WORKDIR=demo-workspace tsx src/cli.ts --mode plan --once "在 demo-workspace 下新增一个 hello.txt 文件并写入问候语，然后列出目录确认"
scripts.demo:subagent: WORKDIR=demo-workspace tsx src/cli.ts --once "调研项目结构并审查代码质量，拆分为多个子任务并行处理"
